entries.title: n8n DataTable Workflow Pattern With Idempotent Upsert And PDF Parser Architecture
entries.summary: Reusable blueprint for n8n ingestion pipelines that parse vendor PDF reports into a normalized deduplicated cache, with verified DataTable node config, deterministic batch_id idempotency, parallel-branch parser shape, and coordinate-aware PDF extraction.

entries.title: RCM AI Knowledge Base — Setup & Architecture
entries.summary: Public GitHub repo designed for AI-readable knowledge persistence across RCM projects — blueprints, strategies, and lessons learned. Note: superseded in part by the v2 multi-agent protocol; see AI_PROTOCOL.md.

entries.title: Universal Claims Ingestion With Transient Cache And Durable Dedupe
entries.summary: Reusable blueprint for multi-source claims ingestion using n8n orchestration, transient staging, durable Supabase dedupe, service-line audit, and control-total validation.

entries.title: Blueprint: Dashboards Ejecutivos RCM desde SQLite hasta React — HF Multi-Clínica
entries.summary: Pipeline completo SQLite a React para análisis ejecutivo de RCM en grupo médico multi-clínica (12 ubicaciones DFW): 45K+ claims, métricas verificadas, 12 lecciones de errores críticos de datos.

entries.title: Multi-Clinic Paid Claims Consolidation From eCW PDF Reports (ALL_CLAIM + PAYMENT + RECEIVABLES)
entries.summary: End-to-end pipeline that consolidates three eCW v12 PDF reports (ALL CLAIM, PAYMENT DETAIL, RECEIVABLES) across 11 clinics × 3 months into a single Excel workbook with 9 sheets (Claims_Detail, Payments_Detail, Receivables_Checks, Summary_Provider_Month, Summary_Insurance_Month, Reconciliation, Master_Enriched, Flags, README). Includes check-level PMT↔REC reconciliation (cuadra a $0 en 31/32 combinaciones), service-line LEFT JOIN AC↔PMT, parallel multiprocessing with pickle cache, scanned-PDF detection, and resilience against two distinct eCW report-header formats (APR-style vs FEB-style label drift). Run against 99 PDFs produces 10,612 Claims rows + 9,866 Payment rows + 1,281 Checks in ~5-7 min cold, <15s warm.

entries.title: Supabase-Authoritative Monday.com Sync With Dry-Run Ledger And Hold Gates
entries.summary: Reusable blueprint for synchronizing normalized claim records from Supabase/Postgres into Monday.com boards while preserving Supabase as the source of truth. The pattern uses read-only inspection, dry-run create/update/skip planning, explicit hold buckets, verified re-read after writes, and separate ledger updates so Monday never becomes the audit source.

entries.title: Denied Claims Refresh With Supabase Authority, Monday Resolution, And Cache Rebuild
entries.summary: Verified strategy for refreshing denied claims from current report files: parse and scope official denial evidence, dry-run against Supabase and Monday, execute idempotent writes with backups and re-read verification, remove stale operational Supabase rows, mark absent Monday items resolved, and rebuild n8n Data Table caches by archiving the old cache and creating a fresh version when in-place refresh is not supported.
